reviews.comment:
Un dato importante el panadero del resto era de el parador Atalaya así que las medias lunas son mucho mejores que las de atalaya.

(Translated by Google)
An important detail: the baker for the rest was from the Atalaya inn, so the croissants are much better than those from Atalaya.

reviews.comment:
Hay gente en el estacionamiento que cuida los autos que no deberían ser tan agresivos en la manera de pedir, insultan a la gente

(Translated by Google)
There are people in the parking lot watching the cars who shouldn't be so aggressive in the way they ask for money; they insult people.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1aU9EeVRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Bien el servicio de la estación, combustibles, aire neumáticos. Bien los baños. Bien sándwiches y palmeritas.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the station was good, including fuel and tires. The restrooms were good. The sandwiches and palmeritas were good.
